articles.title: Verdicts against Meta and Google may bring a new era of big tech accountability - npr.org
articles.description: Advocates hope recent verdicts against social media platforms will build momentum for bigger changes in Silicon Valley.
articles.content:
In 2017, Matthew Herrick sued the dating app Grindr after his ex-boyfriend used fake profiles to harass Herrick and send hundreds of strangers to his home.

articles.title: Microsoft takes on AI rivals with three new foundational models - techcrunch.com
articles.description: MAI released models that can transcribe voice into text as well as generate audio and images after the group's formation six months ago.
articles.content:
Microsoft AI, the tech giant’s research lab, announced the release of three foundational AI models on Thursday that can generate text, voice, and images.
